class.name: rmgo_core/ChassisPowerController
class.description: Chassis power scaling chain controller for RMGO.

class.name: rmgo_core/OmniWheelController
class.description: Omni wheel inverse kinematics chain controller for RMGO.

class.name: rmgo_core/TeleopRemoteController
class.description: Teleop upstream controller that feeds chassis reference interfaces for RMGO.

class.name: rmgo_core/SimpleGimbalController
class.description: RMCS-style simple gimbal controller that keeps yaw/pitch actively commanded.

class.name: rmgo_core/JointVelocityPidController
class.description: RMCS-style velocity PID bridge from control velocity to joint effort.

class.name: rmgo_core/ErrorPidController
class.description: RMCS-style error PID bridge from control angle error to downstream command.

class.name: rmgo_core/FrictionWheelController
class.description: RMCS-style friction wheel controller that drives shooter readiness chain signals.

class.name: rmgo_core/BulletFeederController17mm
class.description: RMCS-style 17mm bullet feeder controller for single, automatic, and eject modes.

class.name: rmgo_core/RefereeUiController
class.description: RMCS-style referee UI object synchronizer for low-rate client display widgets.
